violations.text: Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Dates were added to food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment must obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
